name: reverse-plugin
description: Android APP syscall monitoring + AI analysis. Uses stackplz (eBPF) to trace syscalls with backtraces, reconstructs memory maps, generates HTML reports with AI-powered detection analysis.

plugins.name: re
plugins.description: Stackplz-based Android syscall monitoring, symbolized backtrace, anti-debug/anti-inject/anti-VM detection analysis with AI-generated reports.
